sentences.target: On pique-nique au sommet de la colline.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pik.nik o sɔ.mɛ də la kɔ.lin/

translations.fr: On pique-nique au sommet de la colline.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pik.nik o sɔ.mɛ də la kɔ.lin/
translations.en: We’re having a picnic at the top of the hill.
translations.es: Estamos de picnic en la cima de la colina.
translations.de: Wir picknicken oben auf dem Hügel.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo un picnic in cima alla collina.
translations.ko: 우리는 언덕 꼭대기에서 소풍을 하고 있어요.
translations.ru: Мы устраиваем пикник на вершине холма.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo um piquenique no topo da colina.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang dã ngoại trên đỉnh đồi.
translations.ar: نحن في نزهة على قمة التلة.
translations.nl: We picknicken op de top van de heuvel.
translations.uk: Ми влаштовуємо пікнік на вершині пагорба.
translations.hi: हम पहाड़ी की चोटी पर पिकनिक कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Κάνουμε πικνίκ στην κορυφή του λόφου.
translations.nb: Vi har piknik på toppen av åsen.
translations.id: Kami sedang piknik di puncak bukit.
translations.sv: Vi har picknick på toppen av kullen.
translations.ro: Facem un picnic în vârful dealului.
translations.da: Vi holder picnic på toppen af bakken.
translations.ja: 丘の上でピクニックをしています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject; often means ‘we’ in spoken French.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular agreeing with ‘on’; verb meaning ‘to picnic’ (orthographic hyphen retained).
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the definite article ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces a locative complement.
Common masculine noun meaning ‘summit/top’; head of the prepositional phrase.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement (‘de la colline’).
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘colline’.
Common feminine noun meaning ‘hill’; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Tu vois le sommet de cette montagne.
sentences.reading: /ty vwa lə sɔ.mɛ də sɛt mɔ̃.taɲ/

translations.fr: Tu vois le sommet de cette montagne.
translations.ipa: /ty vwa lə sɔ.mɛ də sɛt mɔ̃.taɲ/
translations.en: You see the top of that mountain.
translations.es: Ves la cima de esa montaña.
translations.de: Du siehst den Gipfel von dem Berg dort.
translations.it: Vedi la cima di quella montagna.
translations.ko: 너는 저 산의 정상을 보고 있어요.
translations.pt: Você vê o topo daquela montanha.
translations.he: אתה רואה את פסגת ההר ההוא.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy đỉnh ngọn núi kia.
translations.nl: Je ziet de top van die berg.
translations.hu: Látod annak a hegynek a csúcsát.
translations.hi: तुम उस पहाड़ की चोटी देखते हो।
translations.el: Βλέπεις την κορυφή εκείνου του βουνού.
translations.nb: Du ser toppen av det fjellet.
translations.sv: Du ser toppen på det där berget.
translations.da: Du ser toppen af det bjerg.
translations.ja: あなたはあの山の頂上が見えます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘sommet’.
Common masculine noun; direct object head of ‘vois’.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement (‘de cette montagne’).
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘montagne’.
Common feminine noun; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Pose la plante au sommet du rocher.
sentences.reading: /poz la plɑ̃t o sɔ.mɛ dy ʁɔ.ʃe/

translations.fr: Pose la plante au sommet du rocher.
translations.ipa: /poz la plɑ̃t o sɔ.mɛ dy ʁɔ.ʃe/
translations.en: Put the plant on top of the rock.
translations.es: Pon la planta encima de la roca.
translations.de: Stell die Pflanze auf den Felsen.
translations.it: Metti la pianta sopra la roccia.
translations.yue: 將植物放喺塊石頭上面。
translations.pt: Coloque a planta em cima da rocha.
translations.he: שים את הצמח על ראש הסלע.
translations.vi: Đặt cây lên trên tảng đá.
translations.nl: Zet de plant bovenop de rots.
translations.hu: Tedd a növényt a szikla tetejére.
translations.el: Βάλε το φυτό πάνω στην πέτρα.
translations.ja: 岩の上に植物を置いてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular; directive addressed to ‘tu’ (understood).
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘plante’.
Common feminine noun; direct object of the imperative verb.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces a locative complement.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘au’.
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with ‘le’ (de + le → du); introduces a genitive-like complement.
Common masculine noun; complement of the preposition ‘du’.

sentences.target: Le soleil disparaît derrière le sommet.

translations.fr: Le soleil disparaît derrière le sommet.
translations.en: The sun is setting behind the peak.
translations.es: El sol se está poniendo detrás de la cima.
translations.de: Die Sonne geht hinter dem Gipfel unter.
translations.it: Il sole sta tramontando dietro la cima.
translations.pt: O sol está se pondo atrás do pico.
translations.vi: Mặt trời đang lặn sau đỉnh núi.
translations.nl: De zon gaat onder achter de top.
translations.hu: A nap lenyugszik a csúcs mögött.
translations.hi: सूरज शिखर के पीछे डूब रहा है।
translations.el: Ο ήλιος δύει πίσω από την κορυφή.
translations.ja: 太陽が山頂の後ろに沈んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘soleil’.
Common masculine noun; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition meaning ‘behind’; introduces a prepositional complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘sommet’.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘derrière’.
